basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Adjunct Faculty/ Visiting Faculty/ Professor of Practice Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NITC) has published the Visiting Faculty / Adjunct Faculty / Professor of Practice / Professor Emeritus Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to engage distinguished academicians, researchers, and industry experts for various faculty positions across multiple departments and centres at NIT Calicut. Candidates below 70 years of age and holding Ph.D. / Post Graduate / Graduate qualifications with relevant professional experience are eligible to apply online at NIT Calicut Official Website. The application process is open through online mode,

age_limit.age_details: Short-term / Part-time (Visiting & Adjunct) / Full-time Contract (Professor of Practice)

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: Ph.D. / Post Graduate / Graduate degree in the respective field from a Centrally Funded Institution (CFI) under Ministry of Education, Government of India. | Experience Required: | 10 / 12 / 15 years of experience after Ph.D. / PG / Graduation respectively. Minimum 3 years in very senior positions (GM / Director / Tech Head / R&D Head / Project Head) in top reputed organizations / top 100 Corporates / ISRO / DRDO / National Research Labs (Scientist F level or above). | Desirable Exposure: | Product design & development, Patents, Technology Transfer Guided internships / student projects Teaching experience at CFIs Research publications in SCI / WoS journals Collaboration with funding agencies, startups / unicorns Consultancy & sponsored research experience | Age Limit: Below 70 years. | Note: Exceptional candidates with outstanding contributions may be considered even if they do not fully meet the above criteria.

how_to_apply: Visit the official online application portal: https://adjunct-faculty-recruit.nitc.ac.in/
Fill the online application form with all required details.
Submit the application before the deadline.
Candidates currently employed in Government / PSU / Autonomous bodies should submit their application through proper channel if shortlisted.
important_instructions: This is a standing advertisement. Applications are scrutinized in June every year. Mere fulfilment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee call for interview. The Institute reserves the right to reject any or all applications without assigning reasons. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Professor of Practice is a full-time one-year position. Age should be below 70 years.

faq.question: Q1. What is NIT Calicut Visiting / Adjunct Faculty & Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NIT Calicut Visiting / Adjunct Faculty & Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 is a standing advertisement by NIT Calicut to engage distinguished academicians, industry experts, researchers and professionals for teaching, research and innovation. The institute is inviting applications for Visiting Faculty, Adjunct Faculty, Professor of Practice and Professor Emeritus positions for the Academic Year 2025‑26.

faq.question: Q2. Which departments and centres are covered under this NIT Calicut faculty advertisement?
faq.answer: The recruitment covers multiple departments and centres of NIT Calicut. These include Architecture and Planning, Chemical Engineering, Education, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Centre for Career Development, Centre for Innovation, Entrepreneurship & Incubation and Centre for Women Welfare & Social Empowerment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut Visiting / Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online up to 10 June 2026, 17:00 hours as per the standing advertisement schedule. Applications are generally scrutinized every year in the month of June, and eligible profiles may be considered as and when requirements arise.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications and experience required?
faq.answer: Applicants should have a Ph.D., Post Graduate or Graduate degree in the relevant field from a Centrally Funded Institution under the Ministry of Education. They must possess 10/12/15 years of experience after Ph.D./PG/Graduation respectively, with at least 3 years in senior leadership roles such as GM, Director, Technical Head, R&D Head or Project Head in top corporates, national labs or reputed organizations.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an age limit for NITC Visiting / Adjunct Faculty and Professor of Practice?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit for these positions is below 70 years. However, the institute may consider exceptionally meritorious candidates with outstanding contributions even if they do not fully satisfy all eligibility parameters.

faq.question: Q6. What are the preferred areas of specialization for this NIT Calicut faculty notification?
faq.answer: Preferred areas include Human Settlement & Climate Change, Sustainable Urban Planning and Resilient Cities in Architecture; Digital Automation, Data Analytics, Fuel Cells and Catalysis in Chemical Engineering; EV Charging, Sensors and Entrepreneurship in Electrical Engineering; Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Embedded Systems and Optimization in ECE; Applied Mathematics and Multivariate Analysis in Mathematics; Nuclear Science and Engineering in Physics; Civil Services Coaching, Aptitude and Personality Development under Career Development; Innovation, Startups and Women Empowerment under the respective centres.

faq.question: Q7. What is the remuneration / honorarium for Visiting and Adjunct Faculty at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Visiting and Adjunct Faculty are paid on a per‑day honorarium basis with a monthly ceiling. Professors receive Rs. 7,000 per day with a ceiling of Rs. 1.20 lakh per month plus up to Rs. 20,000 reimbursable; Associate Professors get Rs. 5,000 per day with a Rs. 1.00 lakh ceiling plus Rs. 20,000 reimbursable; Assistant Professors receive Rs. 3,000 per day with a Rs. 0.80 lakh ceiling plus Rs. 20,000 reimbursable.
